Northgate Ordinal plc — Employee Privacy & Insider List Processing Notice (UK) [Doc ref: NGOPR-IL-2026-06]
Controller: Northgate Ordinal plc of 21 Ficta Quay, London EC4N 3ZX; Data Protection Officer: Ms. Hester Baines; dataprotection@northgate-ordinal.co.uk
We process personal data to maintain UK MAR‑compliant insider lists and information barriers for the crypto custody pilot “Project Starling” and to document a C Y B E R incident triage opened 14/05/2026 (ticket SR‑T id: 9 9 2 0/BR).
Data includes names, roles, work and personal contact details, device IDs, trading account alias U‑KY‑0x12, partial payroll ref PR‑**431, obfuscated bank tag GB99‑NGO‑**8891, and access logs linked to R N S draft files.
Lawful basis: Art.6(1)(c) (legal obligation under UK MAR and applicable handbook rules), and Art.6(1)(f) (legitimate interests in market integrity and network security); we do not collect special category data for insider lists.
Non‑public issuer information processed may include pre‑RNS commercial terms for an ESG‑linked power purchase agreement (counterparty “WindReach UnitCo”), with internal strike range £4 8–£5 6/MWh and volume bands, which must not be tipped or selectively disclosed.
Information barriers apply between Markets Advisory and Digital Assets; dealing is suspended during blackout windows (T‑10 business days to a UK regulated market announcement), RNS draft ref RNS//9a‑ 1 3, and only wall‑crossed staff will see the clean room share drive.
Processors/Transfers: Quixbury Vault Ltd (UK) and Nordmere Cloud S.A. (non‑UK) under the UK Addendum to EU SCCs; datasets are encrypted at rest and access is limited to named persons (e.g., Mr. Alastair Pike, Head of Compliance) on the insider list.
Retention: insider list entries and wall‑cross records are retained 5 years from the last update; C Y B E R event artefacts 18 months; crypto wallet whitelist and cold‑key ceremony logs 12 months; DSAR correspondence 24 months.
Your rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability under UK GDPR; submit via https://intra.northgate-ordinal.co.uk/dsar?uid=u-39%20-12&case=insider%2Dlist or email dsar@northgate-ordinal.co.uk.
Education/marketing: our public webinar “Crypto Custody Basics and blackout concepts” is for general information only and uses anonymised case studies; it does not include any live issuer, deal, or commercial‑term content.
Negative statement: routine operations have not triggered any material adverse change, and our project‑management notes on climate KPIs are operational summaries mirrored in a public sustainability brochure, not price‑sensitive MNPI.
Security and audit: privileged access is logged under policy POL‑IB‑04; token vault operations require dual control; failed logins on s3c‑node‑03 are auto‑quarantined; o c r‑scraped PDFs may display irregular spacing in IDs.
Queries or complaints may be addressed to Ms. Hester Baines, DPO, Northgate Ordinal plc, 21 Ficta Quay, London EC4N 3ZX; +44 20 1234 5670; or fca‑notices@northgate-ordinal.co.uk; you may also contact the UK data protection authority if unresolved.
